projectList.noImg: Click the button next to it to see screenshots.

muddyCodeWorkspace.description:
Work in an Nx monorepo within a complex ERP multi-application system. The project involved development and maintenance of multiple business modules and shared components and services.

Scope of work in business modules:

• Sales module:
Contractor dictionaries, customer orders, price lists, and services.

• PMS:
Technological and production logic, release versions, order registry, calculations (features, feature relations, pricing register), extensive dictionaries (tools, tool types, operations, workstations, workstation rates, qualifications, modifiers).

• Simulations:
Simulation versions and simulation registry.

• WMS:
Index groups.

• LOGS:
System logs module (monitoring and displaying application logs).

• MES:
Production monitoring and control system – handling production processes, employee work tracking, production order control, material consumption tracking, and real-time operation status monitoring.

Services and system architecture

• QBE Service:
Building and handling Query By Example (QBE) queries.

• Attachment Service:
File upload and download with upload progress support (XMLHttpRequest with progress events), backend integration, and streaming on the frontend side.

• User Settings – user settings stored in localStorage:
- table and view configurations
- language settings
- access control

• Authentication and session mechanisms
- login and session recovery mechanism
- token expiration handling and request retry after refresh
- request cancellation on user switch
- HTTP interceptors handling token and authentication
- idle timeout mechanism based on user activity (mouse tracking)

Application and access management

• ActiveApp Service:
Control of available applications and features per user (permission system).

• Components and UI layer
Shared components:
- loader
- attachment component
- error handling system based on snackbar service
- extended tree component (tree view, dynamic node add/remove, hover details, process path generation and visualization)
- component development and support:
- modal system
- numeric keyboard component

For over 1.5 years of work on the project, I was responsible for developing the ERP system – frontend layer, service architecture, and shared components. The work included expanding existing modules, implementing new features, and stabilizing and evolving the system in an enterprise environment.

muddyCodeSite.description: The “Muddy Code” website was built using the Wix platform. It is a simple website containing information about the company, offered services, and a contact section enabling direct communication with clients.

familiaMedSite.description: Development and maintenance of the project, SEO work (search engine optimization), analysis and fixing of existing bugs, and refactoring of older system parts. Expansion of the homepage and subpages (including Familiamed Clinique – eyelid surgery), as well as improving performance and stability of the website. Continued development of the project after previous teams, with focus on code quality and user experience.

quickAtest.description: The single-page application “Quick Atest” was designed to streamline the process of creating and merging documents required for orders. It allows content filtering, Excel data generation, and downloading selected documents as a single combined PDF file.

muddyCode.description: Since January 2024, I have been working as a Frontend Developer. I am responsible for developing and maintaining the frontend layer of web applications, ensuring functionality, performance, and UI quality. I started with smaller projects and gradually took on more complex and extensive solutions. I collaborate with backend teams, UX/UI designers, and participate in implementing new features.

montService.description: I was responsible for diagnosing, repairing, and maintaining cash registers, payment terminals, and electronic devices used in retail points. I performed service work on both hardware and electronic components, ensuring proper operation of sales systems. I handled installation, configuration, and troubleshooting, ensuring continuous customer operations.
